programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Jodoh Gak Seprofesi, I'm Not Father
programme.desc: The life of a beautiful girl who loves dangdut music and enjoys making live content, her name is Lena. On the other side, there is a handsome meatball seller who loves K-Pop dance, his name is Juna. It is told that Juna and Lena go live together, and they end up arguing because they feel disturbed by each other. Both of them don't care, even though some people urge them to collaborate. programme.title: Keris (Spc. Hari Raya Nyepi)
programme.desc: A story about a keris believed to possess supernatural powers. Those who believe in the keris will become so suggestible that it will eventually make them sick.

programme.title: Jangan Ambil Bayiku
programme.desc: After giving birth to her son, Eliana felt that her marriage to Mahesa was beginning to crumble. The situation became even more complicated when Rosita suddenly tried to take her baby and her husband away.

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Mau Keren Malah Jualan Es Legen
programme.desc: Aden is a popular ice legen seller. Suddenly, a woman named Azizah approached him. She wasn't there to buy ice; instead, she had another intention, which was to change the ice's brand to 'Ronald' as ordered by her boss, Ronald. She even disguised herself to find out the recipe and secrets of the ice legen that Aden sells. However, her disguise was uncovered by Daniel. Azizah was angry and confused

programme.title: Pelan Pelan Bejek Cintanya Neng Supir Uwiuwiuw
programme.desc: Aryo was given a will by his mother to go to Jakarta to find his uncle. However, on the way, he got stranded in a village in Tasik. He met Lala, an ambulance driver who helped him. Aryo had to disguise himself as Christ Marto, a foreigner who was to hold a concert in the village.

programme.title: Dikasih Cobaan Malah Dicobain
programme.desc: One day, Acha's motorcycle almost collided with the old car that Dion was driving. programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Neng Rujak Emang Boleh Ya Segalak Itu
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Arina sells fruit salad. Arina joins a matchmaking app and meets a handsome man with long hair. Because she's afraid to meet in real life, she asks her friend Ria to take her place. At first, Ria refuses, but eventually agrees to meet the man on the app due to Arina's insistence. programme.title: Agak Lain Cewek Samson Yang Satu Ini
programme.desc: Erina is indeed somewhat different from ordinary girls. She has nicknamed the Samson girl because she possesses super strength like Samson. However, her strength suddenly disappears because she has feelings for someone named Leo. So, how can Erina restore her strength? Could it be that she has to let go of her love for Leo?

programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mba Pembersih Berkilau Aku Nyangkut Di Hatimu
programme.desc: Diva (Ika Diharjo) accidentally saw Andre (Christ Laurent) being hypnotized on the street, Diva and her mother finally brought Andre to her house even though the cat is kucingan with Mr. RT. It has been going on for several hours that the hypnosis does not disappear and makes Andre realize who he really is. Diva and her mother are getting dizzy, so they agree to give Andre the pseudonym Cecep.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dangdut Kelaz Aku Kamu Paling Pas
programme.desc: Topan (Indra Brotolaras) goes to the village to look for his biological mother with a photo provided by his father. Topan then searches for a dangdut studio, which turns out to have a vocalist named Novia (Nabila Zavira). Novia initially rejects Topan's presence, thinking that city boys don't like dangdut music. But all of that was disproved by Topan's earnestness when learning dangdut music.

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 52
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 26
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: AIRA EPS 14
programme.desc: Aira was at the peak of happiness as she prepared to welcome her wedding day with her beloved, Adrian. However, one day before the big day, a request from her superior, Haris, forced her to return to the office to send a forgotten email. That decision became the starting point of a tragedy that changed Aira's life forever.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 1-2
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: TEBARAN HATI EPS 23
programme.desc: This story begins with Ariana, a renowned reporter and the adopted daughter of the respected Prawira family. She is willing to sacrifice everything to protect the good name of the family that raised her. When Ladya, her adopted younger sister, becomes depressed after getting pregnant out of wedlock and being abandoned by her boyfriend who flees abroad, to the point of attempting suicide, Ariana is

programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 387
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.
